class.name: AbilitySystemTask
class.brief_description: Base class for asynchronous tasks within the Ability System.
class.description: [AbilitySystemTask] is the base class for all asynchronous actions that can be performed during an ability's execution.

method.name: end_task
method.description: Ends the task and emits the [signal completed] signal.

method.name: is_finished
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the task has completed.

method.name: set_owner
method.description: Assigns the owning [AbilitySystemComponent] to the task.

signal.name: completed
signal.description: Emitted when the task is finished.

constants.constant: Generic task with no specific behavior.
Task that waits for a specified time delay.
Task that plays an animation and waits for it to finish.
Task that waits for a specific ability system tag event.
